items.title: Solana’s mid-range trap – Here’s why SOL traders should stay cautious!
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's current price range indicates potential volatility, suggesting traders should remain vigilant about market movements and liquidity.

items.title: Umbra opens privacy wallet to the public on Solana, powered by Arcium’s encrypted execution engine
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of Umbra's privacy wallet enhances Solana's ecosystem, potentially attracting more users focused on secure transactions and privacy features.

items.title: Lummis says CLARITY Act will deliver 'strongest' developer protections
items.whyYouShouldCare: The CLARITY Act aims to strengthen developer protections, which could foster innovation and stability within the Solana ecosystem.
